name: Etherplay
short_description: Dundee studio making open source blockchain games
about:
Etherplay is a Dundee game studio, founded in 2016, that publishes open-source work. It started with web games and now focuses on on-chain games—fully persistent, permissionless titles (sometimes called autonomous worlds).

Released or ongoing projects include Ethernal, Conquest.eth (a diplomacy game with value on-chain), and Stratagems. Earlier work included a browser-based skill-game platform under the Etherplay name, early Ethereum games in the browser, and on-chain experiments such as Tug of War and Ethernal (with Jia), including a Polygon testnet release.
